test.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/wrapper" && cargo test && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/shared" && npx vitest run && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && npx vitest run && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" && npx vitest run

typecheck.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/shared" && npx tsc --noEmit && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && npx tsc --noEmit && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" && npx tsc --noEmit

lint.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/server" && npx eslint src/ && cd "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" && npx eslint src/ && tmpdir=$(mktemp -d) && cd "$tmpdir" && apt-get download rust-clippy >/dev/null && dpkg-deb -x rust-clippy_*.deb "$tmpdir/extract" && PATH="$tmpdir/extract/usr/bin:$PATH" cargo clippy --manifest-path "/data/dl/fschannel/wrapper/Cargo.toml" --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings

blockingIssues.description: The fix resolves the original cancelled-approval prompt misclassification, but `bot/src/bot-service.ts` now rethrows unexpected forwarding errors out of the fire-and-forget timer path (`void this.pollForwarding(...)`), which can crash the bot on Node 22 via an unhandled promise rejection.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document the cursor-based `/users/:id/events` feed and attach-time `userEventCursor` contract now used for lossless attached forwarding.
Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to note the bot's in-memory per-user/per-session notification route map that scopes detached background notifications.
